typography.instructions: Replace Cormorant Garamond with Outfit for all headings to establish a clean, minimal, rounded look. Maintain Manrope for body text. Ensure line-height is relaxed for body text and tight for headings.

layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for containers.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Extremely rounded. Main containers and cards should use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. Buttons, badges, and avatars must be rounded-full.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Minimal lines. Use very light gray borders (border-border) or rely entirely on soft shadows.

components_instructions.cards: Use bg-white, soft shadow, and rounded-3xl. Remove dark background classes.
components_instructions.buttons: Always rounded-full. Primary buttons should be solid primary color with white text. Apply subtle scale/opacity transitions on hover.
components_instructions.inputs: Light gray background (bg-slate-50), transparent borders, rounded-xl. Focus state adds primary ring.

image_urls.description: Minimal abstract warm alabaster hero background
Cinema camera lens on a minimal off-white background
Behind the scenes on a film set indoor setting
Two men recording video on rocks

instructions_to_main_agent: Overhaul the tailwind.config.js and src/index.css completely to transition from the current Dark mode to the new Light mode.
Remove all dark mode default backgrounds (e.g., bg-[#0A0A0A], bg-black, bg-zinc-950) across all React components and replace them with bg-background or bg-white.
Update text classes from text-white or text-zinc-100 to text-foreground (dark charcoal) or text-slate-800 for legibility.
Replace Cormorant Garamond with Outfit in index.css font definitions for headings (h1, h2, h3, .font-display).
Apply 'rounded-full' to all buttons and 'rounded-2xl' or 'rounded-3xl' to cards. Eliminate sharp corners.
Ensure the dashboard sidebar and topnav have a clean white or off-white background with minimal border-slate-100 dividers.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='gig-card').
Replace the dark gold accent (--brand-gold) with the new bright Cinematic Amber (#E05D26) defined in CSS variables.
Update the landing page to feature the abstract alabaster hero background and place feature imagery inside soft rounded-3xl containers with generous padding.
